terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.01: This service is provided as-is without warranties of any kind, including accuracy or availability.
terms.02: Audio data is compressed and split in the browser, then sent to the OpenAI API using your API key. No audio data is stored on our servers.
terms.03: You are responsible for managing your API key. It is stored in your browser's localStorage.
terms.04: The developer assumes no liability for any damages arising from the use of this service.

terms.06: These terms may be changed without prior notice.
